message:
test(unit): expand splay_tree.rs inline tests from 19 to 46 (+27) (ft-hhqdm)

Cover empty tree ops, remove-all, ascending/descending insert order,
free-list arena reuse, interleaved insert/remove, splay-to-root
verification, kth/rank inverse, min/max removal, clone independence,
serde after removes, size consistency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
